name: Apple___Apple_scab
cure: Use resistant varieties, maintain orchard sanitation, and apply recommended fungicides.

name: Apple___Cedar_apple_rust
cure: Remove nearby juniper hosts and apply fungicides during the growing season.

name: Apple__healthy
cure: Continue proper watering, fertilization, and regular pruning.

name: Background_without_leaves
cause: No plant leaf detected in the image.

name: Blueberry___healthy
cure: Maintain proper irrigation and balanced fertilization.

name: Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew
cure: Apply suitable fungicides, improve air circulation, and prune infected branches.

name: Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_spot
cure: Use resistant hybrids, rotate crops, and apply fungicides if necessary.

name: Corn___healthy
cure: Maintain proper irrigation, fertilization, and field hygiene.

name: Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight
cure: Grow resistant varieties, rotate crops, remove infected debris, and apply fungicides.

name: Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_
cure: Use resistant varieties and apply fungicides when disease pressure is high.

name: Grape___Black_rot
cure: Prune infected vines, remove diseased fruits, and spray fungicides.

name: Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles)
cause: A complex fungal disease affecting grapevines.
cure: Remove infected wood, disinfect pruning tools, and maintain vine health.

name: Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot)
cure: Remove infected leaves and apply appropriate fungicides.

name: Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening)
cause: Bacterium Candidatus Liberibacter spp., spread by citrus psyllids.
cure: Control psyllids and remove severely infected trees.

name: Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot
cure: Use disease-free seeds, copper-based sprays, and crop rotation.

name: Potato___Early_blight
cure: Rotate crops, remove infected leaves, and apply fungicides.

name: Potato___Late_blight
cure: Use resistant varieties, avoid overhead irrigation, and apply fungicides.

name: Soybean___healthy
cure: Maintain proper field management and balanced nutrition.

name: Squash___Powdery_mildew
cure: Improve air circulation and apply sulfur or other recommended fungicides.

name: Strawberry___Leaf_scorch
cure: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicides if necessary.

name: Tomato___Bacterial_spot
cure: Use copper sprays, disease-free seeds, and practice crop rotation.

name: Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider_mite
cure: Apply miticides or insecticidal soap and maintain adequate humidity.

name: Tomato___Target_Spot
cure: Remove infected leaves and apply suitable fungicides.

name: Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus
cause: Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus spread by whiteflies.
cure: Control whiteflies, remove infected plants, and grow resistant varieties.
